entities.name: Distribution-First Narrative
entities.context: Community-centric framing that emphasizes network penetration over product/revenue metrics

entities.name: Network Penetration Metrics
entities.context: Quantifiable metrics based on community contracts, LOIs, and candidate reach

entities.name: Product/Revenue Metrics
entities.context: Traditional business metrics that the distribution-first approach reframes away from

relationships.context: Proposed this as a reframing strategy for positioning
